title: Structural and FTIR spectroscopic studies of matrix-isolated 3-thio-1,2,4-triazole complexes with carbon dioxide. The UV-induced formation of thiol⋯CO2 complexes
author: Mucha, Karolina
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Spectra files: 
 MTR0507a5 - ST monomer spectrum in Ar matrix 
 MTR0507a6 - ST monomer spectrum in Ar matrix after annealing at 32K/10K 
 STCO22501a5.1 - ST co-deposited with CO2 (CO2/Ar = 1/500) 
 STCO22501a56 - ST co-deposited with CO2 (CO2/Ar = 1/500) after annealing at 32K/10K 
 STCO22501b5.2 - ST co-deposited with CO2 (CO2/Ar = 1/1000) 
 STCO22501b8 - ST co-deposited with CO2 (CO2/Ar = 1/1000) after annealing at 32K/10K 
 STCO2290b14 - ST/CO2/Ar (CO2/Ar = 1/500) spectrum after irradiation at 270 nm for 16 mins
